channel.title: RoboDodd
channel.description: Explore detailed guides, setups, and experiments for Kubernetes, app development, and home labs. Empowering your tech journey with clear insights.

item.title: Budget-Friendly Local AI Hardware for Running Ollama — 2026 Edition
item.description: A year later and the local-AI hardware landscape has flipped. The RTX 50 series landed, AMD got its act together on Windows, DGX Spark and Framework Desktop put 128GB of unified memory on your desk, and a global DRAM shortage made everything cost more. Here's what's actually worth buying for Ollama in April 2026.

item.title: Upgrading Homelab K3s to 1.35: Live Pod Resize Without Restarts
item.description: K3s 1.35 shipped in January 2026 with two features that actually matter for homelabs: in-place pod resize (GA) and OCI image volumes (Stable). Here's the upgrade walkthrough on a 3-node cluster, with a zero-downtime memory bump demo.

item.title: Building a Static Blog to Replace Ghost
item.description: I replaced my self-hosted Ghost blog with a static site — cheaper, faster, and with almost no attack surface. Here's the stack and how you can do the same.

item.title: Google Places Autocomplete Directive – Angular 21
item.description: Learn how to build a custom Google Places Autocomplete directive in Angular 21 with a fully styled dropdown, keyboard navigation, and parsed address output.

item.title: NoteMode: An Open-Source Notepad++ Alternative After the Security Incident
item.description: Looking for a Notepad++ alternative? Flit is an open source, cross-platform text editor with syntax highlighting, session persistence, and dual themes.

item.title: Migrating Azure Front Door to Cloudflare Storage Connectors
item.description: Migrate from Azure Front Door to Cloudflare CDN using Storage Connectors. Enable multiple custom domains on Azure Storage without an Enterprise plan.

item.title: Recover from Azure Front Door Outages: A Quick Guide
item.description: Azure Front Door down? Learn how to quickly set up Azure Application Gateway and Traffic Manager to restore your site and prevent future outages.

item.title: Teaching Claude Modern Angular Best Practices with Custom Instructions
item.description: Configure Claude AI to automatically generate modern Angular 20 code with signals, standalone components, and new control flow syntax.

item.title: Building a Custom SQL Server Docker Image with Full-Text Search Support
item.description: Learn how to create a custom SQL Server 2022 Docker image with Full-Text Search, publish it to Docker Hub, and use it for fast, scalable text search.

item.title: 3D Printed Baking Soda Bracket for Your Garbage Can
item.description: A simple 3D print to hold a box of baking soda in your garbage can—perfect for reducing odors in garages or enclosed spaces.

item.title: Replace SendGrid Parse with a Free Cloudflare Worker Email Parser
item.description: Build a free SendGrid Parse replacement using Cloudflare Workers. Parse and forward emails to your API with zero monthly costs and easy setup.

item.title: My Top 2025 Amazon Father’s Day Tech Gifts
item.description: Top Father's Day tech gift picks for 2025—tested and approved! Perfect gadgets for dads who love smart, practical gear.

item.title: Dynamic Environment Variables in Angular: A Docker-Ready Solution
item.description: Learn how to inject environment variables into Angular apps at runtime using Docker - no more rebuilds for config changes! Complete guide with code examples.

item.title: Make Your k3s Local Storage Persistent with Longhorn
item.description: Learn how to install Longhorn in k3s and migrate from local-path PVCs to resilient, node-independent Longhorn volumes.

item.title: How to Bypass Windows 11 Microsoft Account Requirement
item.description: Install Windows 11 without internet or a Microsoft account using this quick trick with a simple command.

item.title: How to Set Up Cloudflare Tunnels for k3s Without MetalLB
item.description: Expose k3s services with Cloudflare Tunnels—no MetalLB, no LAN IPs, no firewall hassle. Simple, secure remote access in minutes.

item.title: 10 Must-Have VS Code Extensions for Angular Developers
item.description: Supercharge Your Angular Dev Environment: 10 Essential VS Code Extensions for Faster, Cleaner Code

item.title: Angular 19 Essentials: First Steps for New Developers
item.description: Transform from complete beginner to Angular 19 developer with this step-by-step guide to setting up your environment and building your first web application.

item.title: Setting Up Eclipse Mosquitto (MQTT) on K3s: A Complete Guide
item.description: Deploy Eclipse Mosquitto on K3s with persistent storage for a lightweight, reliable MQTT broker perfect for your IoT projects and smart home automation.

item.title: 3D-Printed Modular Rack for Mac Mini M4 & Beelink EQ12/EQ13
item.description: 3D-print a modular, screw-free rack for your Mac Mini M4 & Beelink EQ12/EQ13. Stack securely, optimize airflow, and keep your setup organized!
